activities.description: First ride on the new Pike Ultimate. Night and day difference on the drops. Traction through the loose stuff is insane. Segment times way down already.

activities.name: Fork Test - BST South
activities.description: BST south loop. Downhill segments noticeably faster. Still dialing in the rebound but the confidence through the switchbacks is already huge.

activities.name: Corner Canyon Full Run
activities.description: Full Corner Canyon top to bottom. PRs across the board, 8-12% faster on every timed segment. Two months of debating and this fork was worth it.
